introSection: Sierra Sidewinder is a Mack Rides spinning roller coaster located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. Opened on May 26, 2007, it is the first roller coaster to feature multiple free spinning cars on a train, rather than individual spinning cars.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Sierra Sidewinder was announced on November 29, 2006. The attraction opened on May 26, 2007.

fullText:
Sierra Sidewinder is a Mack Rides spinning roller coaster located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. Opened on May 26, 2007, it is the first roller coaster to feature multiple free spinning cars on a train, rather than individual spinning cars.

Sierra Sidewinder was announced on November 29, 2006. The attraction opened on May 26, 2007.
